candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; best direct match for REVT.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and identical to Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if labels vary by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the reported revenue line.

candidates.why: Primary direct production/procurement cost line; strong COGS match.
Inventory change is commonly part of cost of sales when presented separately.
Balancing row, not an economic line item; should be excluded when components exist.

variables.notes: Selected component rows that together represent cost of sales; excluded the balancing row.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component and valid SG&A bucket.
Operating overhead component and valid SG&A bucket.
Headcount metric, not an expense row; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present, so selected the best overhead component buckets. Excluded advertising because it appears to be embedded within Other operating expenses, and excluded D&A.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line available across years; acceptable fallback if a dedicated interest expense line is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct dedicated interest expense line; preferred for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but only a component of total interest expense, so lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of the lease-interest component, not preferred as the main XINT line.
Balancing row, not a true reported expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Using a priority list: prefer the dedicated interest expense line, with Finance costs as fallback for years where the dedicated line is unavailable.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it is total parent/owner equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity line, but less preferred than parent-only equity because it may include NCI in other cases.
Balancing row, not a true equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not an equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Using owner/parent equity as preferred BE to avoid double counting any non-controlling interests; Total Equity kept as fallback if labels vary by year.
No minority interest or non-controlling interests line appears in the balance sheet preview.
